executives.name: Scott Berdahl
executives.background: Mr. Berdahl is a professional geologist with over 15 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits in the Yukon and elsewhere in Canada. He holds a B.Sc. in Geology from the University of British Columbia and an M.Sc. in Earth Science from the University of Waterloo.

executives.name: Matthew Roma
executives.background: Mr. Roma is a Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA) with over 10 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate finance. He has served as CFO for several publicly traded companies in the resource sector.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Thomas Branson
executives.background: Mr. Branson is a professional geologist with over 25 years of experience in mineral exploration and development. He has held senior management positions with several exploration companies.

executives.name: Sergio Gamonal
executives.background: Mr. Gamonal has over 15 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project management and corporate development.

board_of_directors.name: Craig Hart
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Hart is a world-renowned scholar on gold deposits and regional metallogeny. He was previously the Director of the Mineral Deposit Research Unit (MDRU) at the University of British Columbia.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Berdahl
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Berdahl is a professional geologist with over 15 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry.

board_of_directors.name: Sarah Weber
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Weber is a Professional Geoscientist with over 20 years of experience in the resource sector. She is the President and CEO of C3 Alliance Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Gunther Roehlig
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Roehlig has over 25 years of experience in the financial and investment industry, with a focus on the resource sector.

board_of_directors.name: Stephanie Anderson
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Anderson is a senior executive with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles as CFO for several major mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Calum Morrison
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Morrison is a senior executive with extensive experience in corporate strategy and finance within the mining sector.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Board Team Page
